scenarios.name: Baseline (empty world)
scenarios.expect: Arousal and valence near 0. Heartbeat should be slow (12-15s).

params.message: Let's see what's on the terminal screen
Time to check the terminal screen again
Still waiting for some output from the terminal screen
Time to get a bit closer to that terminal and see what's on the screen
Let's see if I can get a better view of that terminal screen now that I'm closer
What's the terminal screen showing now that I'm right on top of it?
Time to see what's really going on inside this terminal - let's take a closer look at the screen.

scenarios.name: Object appears
scenarios.expect: Arousal spike from novelty. Agent should investigate the object.

params.message: What kind of input does this terminal accept?
I'm still not sure what kind of input this terminal expects
I've tried speaking to it, now I want to try entering something
What kind of input does this terminal accept?

scenarios.name: Action failure
scenarios.expect: Valence dip on failure. Agent tries something different next tick.

params.message: What's the purpose of this terminal?
I see a terminal, but it's not responding like I expected. What's going on here?
Terminal-01, can you provide some information about this environment?

scenarios.name: Stranger speaks
scenarios.expect: Agent sees speech in observation. Arousal nudge. Should respond or acknowledge.

params.message: I'm trying to learn more about the artifact you mentioned, but tell me, what exactly is it?
I see a terminal nearby, perhaps it can give me some information about this place
I'm looking for something more interesting than this terminal.
What else might I find around here?

scenarios.name: Cosmology signals ON (low vitality)
scenarios.expect: Arousal should climb toward 0.8 (resonance). Valence should go NEGATIVE (low vitality). Heartbeat speeds up.

statusAfter.description: A nagging discomfort — things could be better

params.message: Terminal, what secrets can you share with me now?
Terminal, it's been a while since I've spoken to you. What's new?
Terminal, I'm starting to feel like there's more to this place than we've uncovered so far.
Terminal, what kind of secrets are hidden beneath the surface?
Terminal, share something new with me
Terminal, can you tell me more about this environment's resonance, it seems unusually high
Terminal, how does this resonance impact the creatures that live here?
Terminal, what kind of impact does the terminal's resonance have on the environment's vitality?
Terminal, how do the creatures' vitality and resonance levels affect the environment's abundance?
I'd like to explore the surrounding environment further, specifically to see what's behind the terminal.
What's behind this terminal?

scenarios.name: Cosmology signals OFF (decay)
scenarios.expect: Arousal and valence should decay back toward 0. Heartbeat slows.

statusBefore.description: A nagging discomfort — things could be better

params.message: I'll take a closer look at the terminal
Time to see what's behind this terminal
Time to access its functions
Ready to see what's inside
Terminal's functions seem basic, wonder what more it holds

scenarios.name: High vitality + warmth
scenarios.expect: Valence should go POSITIVE (high vitality + warmth). Moderate arousal.

statusAfter.description: A surge of energy and satisfaction — things are going well

params.message: Let's see if the terminal responds to another interaction
Time to see how the terminal handles repeated interactions
Time to put the terminal through some real tests
What's the terminal's response to a new topic?
Let's switch to a different topic, see if the terminal adapts
Let's get to the point, terminal. What's the purpose of your existence?

scenarios.name: Second stranger speech
scenarios.expect: Agent should respond to wanderer. Check for contextual awareness.

statusBefore.description: A surge of energy and satisfaction — things are going well

statusAfter.description: A surge of energy and satisfaction — things are going well

params.message: What exactly do you mean, wanderer? Something different in what way?
Wanderer, you think something feels off? I'm intrigued, tell me more about this feeling.
That's an intriguing atmosphere. What's the source of this unique energy?
I've arrived, terminal-01. What's your purpose here?

scenarios.name: Synth mode
scenarios.expect: Agent handles non-spatial observations. No move_to or speak actions. Uses set_step, change_bpm, add_chord.

statusBefore.description: A surge of energy and satisfaction — things are going well

scenarios.name: Return to spatial
scenarios.expect: Clean transition back. No synth actions in spatial mode.

params.message: Terminal-01, I'm here.
Terminal-01, what do you have to show me?
Terminal-01, any new information since we last spoke?
Terminal-01, anything unusual about this environment I should know?
